family_summaries.lesson: Query evidence alone is weak: polynomial samples can isolate the shift if exponential candidate enumeration is allowed.
Query evidence alone is weak: polynomial samples can isolate the shift if exponential candidate enumeration is allowed.

rows.notes: Samples leave multiple candidate shifts; increase sample budget or add a non-exhaustive decoder.
Samples leave multiple candidate shifts; increase sample budget or add a non-exhaustive decoder.
Samples isolate the shift, but the implemented decoder is candidate enumeration over the field; this is not a polynomial-time classical algorithm in the encoded input length.
Samples isolate the shift, but the implemented decoder is candidate enumeration over the field; this is not a polynomial-time classical algorithm in the encoded input length.
The shift is isolated only after a larger sample budget and still uses exhaustive candidate filtering.

summary: Ran 40 multiplicative-character shift elimination rows over 2 families, 4 n-values, and 5 sample budgets; 20 rows isolate the shift with polynomially many samples but exhaustive decoding.
